title: Vibrant Umami Croatian Vegetable Skewers
description: A colorful and flavorful plant-based Croatian dish featuring tamarind paste and infused oil, perfect for a crowd-pleasing dinner or snack.

ingredients.name: mushrooms
ingredients.notes: button or cremini, cut into 1-inch pieces

instructions: Preheat the grill to medium-high heat, about 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a small bowl, whisk together tamarind paste, olive oil, garlic, smoked paprika, salt, and black pepper to make the infused oil.
Thread the red bell pepper, zucchini, cherry tomatoes, onion, and mushrooms onto skewers, leaving a little space between each piece.
Brush the infused oil mixture onto both sides of the vegetables.
Grill the skewers for 10-12 minutes, turning occasionally, until the vegetables are tender and lightly charred.
Serve the skewers hot, garnished with fresh parsley or cilantro if desired.
Let the skewers rest for a few minutes before serving to allow the juices to redistribute.
Serve with your favorite sides, such as quinoa or roasted potatoes.
